name: title
description: An optional title for the button.

name: icon
description: The name of a Font Awesome icon, without the prefixed `fa-`.

name: brandIcon
description: The name of a Font Awesome brand icon, without the prefixed `fa-`.

name: accent
description: Use the accent style for the button.

name: iconOnly
description: Don't display the button text, just an icon.

name: iconOnlyOnMobile
description: Hide the button text on mobile and display only the icon.

name: rightAlignIcon
description: Align the icon to the right side of the button.

name: buttonElement
description: Output a `<button>` element rather than an `<a>` element.

name: buttonType
description: When using `buttonElement`, set the `type` of `<button>` element, defaults to `button`.

name: classes
description: Classes to add to the button.

name: attributes
description: HTML attributes (for example data attributes) to add to the button.
